Synthetic spec for Phase 7 variation: stale-spec SHA mismatch

1 Scope

This fixture ships with a freshly-regenerated text body but the
quality/formal_docs_manifest.json record carries an old
document_sha256 value from before a spec bump. The gate must
detect the stale hash via invariant #3 (citation_stale).

2.4 Device initialization
The driver MUST perform the following steps, in order, before the
device is considered operational. Bumped paragraph follows:
- Verify feature bit VERSION_2 (v1.2 addition, not in v1.1).
- Reset before reading device-status registers.
